output: She said it was the worst concert she'd ever been to. My grandma, she adored music. She came to every single one of my performances, you know, even when her back was just screaming at her. She just wanted to hear me play. But this new director, he chose the most bizarre music. It was completely atonal, just… strange. Grandma was expecting something like Sousa, something with a real beat, and instead, she got noise. She didn't sugarcoat it at all. "That was terrible," she told me, and I knew she was right. The whole band sounded off. My boyfriend even agreed. A week after that concert, she went to the doctor. They found a rare, aggressive brain tumor. She passed away just a month later. Her last concert. Her final review. The worst one ever, and I'm still so bitter about it.
